title: 10 Herbal Tinctures For Hyperacidity
description: Cinnamomum verum tinctures contains cinnamaldehyde, a compound that helps with hyperacidity by reducing inflammation in the stomach and alleviating symptoms of heartburn and acid reflux. It also contains other properties like cinnamic acid, linalool, and eugenol, which have natural antacid and anti-inflammatory effects. When taken, Cinnamomum verum tinctures can help to neutralize excess stomach acid, reduce the burning sensation, and calm the digestive system.  To use Cinnamomum verum...
